output.formatted:
The song 'I Can Only Imagine' was released on 2001-01-01.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?released WHERE {
  ?item rdfs:label "I Can Only Imagine" @en ; wdt:P577 ?released .
}
```
